about.orgName: Asian Academy for Peace, Research and Development
about.intro: Asian Academy for Peace, Research and Development, a non-profit organization, is desirous to see 'All Human beings live in harmony and peace with dignity thereby enjoying potential to growth and development in a sustainable manner', and aiming at to promote quality services though knowledge generation, capacity building, linking practice, policy, and academia.
about.intro2: Asian Peace Academy works with and for Peacebuilding and development organizations in Kathmandu and abroad to identify local Peacebuilding and development needs; to support and accompany with relevant institutions and stakeholders for developing local capacities. Developing capacity is a key in achieving its vision and mission, therefore, Asian Peace Academy engages in capacity development of local peace and development actors, particularly from youth, women and marginalized groups. Civil society organizations and local government actors are also encouraged and accompanied with.
about.keyAreasHeading: Key areas of Asian Peace Academy involve

pillars.title: Knowledge Generation
pillars.body: Asian Peace Academy has been working in the area of knowledge generation. It believes local knowledge and practices for Peacebuilding and development is rich and it has not yet been dig out and contributed to the academic world. It has a research as key pillar for the knowledge generation. There are many research and publications working for and with many national and international organizations on different issues. The organization has enough human resource to take care of the research work.

pillars.title: Capacity Development
pillars.body: The organization since its inception was able to build capacity of different civil society organizations. With the strong team of facilitators, training designer and management, it has build the capacity of civil society organizations in the areas of – Peacebuilding and Conflict Transformation – New deal principle and SDGs – Result Based Management – Leadership and Effective – Public Speaking – Organizational Governance and Management – Advocacy – Nonviolence Movement and Nonviolence

pillars.title: Linking Practice, Policy and Academia
pillars.body: Asian Peace Academy has been implementing project to establish social cohesion and social harmony in the divided community in different districts of Nepal. Asian Peace Academy wish to use knowledge gained in Peacebuilding, and development implementing project at the community and use link the knowledge gained in the community to policy and academia. The access of the organization is in all provinces either in project implementation, research or technical support to the civil society organizations.
